posts.name: Tommy
posts.body:
Welcome to the feed. Post anything you've tinkered with, broken, fixed, or want made. Photos welcome. Be kind, keep it on-topic, that's it.

· No sign-in needed to post or react
· Custom requests with a few +1s usually become a batch
· I read everything, even at 11pm

posts.name: Aroha S.
posts.body: Stuck the new vinyl decals on the chilly bin this morning. Survived an hour at the beach and a sandy dog. Sealed, sealed, sealed.

comments.name: Marko
comments.body: Need the same set for my pataka. Where do I sign up?

posts.name: Pip L.
posts.body: Idea: a phone stand that hooks over a kitchen cupboard handle so I can follow a recipe without smearing flour on the screen. Anyone else want one?

comments.name: Tommy
comments.body: Already sketching. Measure your handle width and reply with it.

comments.name: Jules
comments.body: +1, my partner does pasta from scratch and my phone has paid the price.

posts.name: Ben K.
posts.body: Cutlery drawer organiser — install no. 3 this month. Two more drawers to go, then I'm coming for the linen cupboard.

posts.name: Marina
posts.body: Quick one: PETG or PLA for an outdoor letterbox flag in Auckland weather? Have heard mixed things.

comments.name: Tommy
comments.body: PETG, every time, if it sees the sun. PLA goes soft on a hot west-facing wall.

posts.name: Hēmi
posts.body: Helensville crew — anyone want to do a pickup run on Saturday? Save us all on shipping.

comments.name: Tommy
comments.body: Saturday 9-1 the workshop's open. Flick me your order numbers and I'll bundle them.
